title: scutellaria yangbiensis
intro: Scutellaria yangbiensis, a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, is also known as Yangbi skullcap. It is native to Yunnan Province in China and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, Scutellaria yangbiensis is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and its extracts are used to treat a range of health conditions.
